name: MARV
mission: Modular Avionics for Rockets and Vehicles — the team's IREC 2026 vehicle, targeting a 10,000 ft apogee on a commercial solid motor with a fully custom avionics stack.

subsystems.name: Avionics
subsystems.summary: Dual-core RP2350 flight computer with a custom sensor suite and long-range LoRa telemetry.

subsystems.name: Recovery
subsystems.summary: Dual-deployment with a drogue at apogee and main at 700 ft.

subsystems.name: Airframe
subsystems.summary: Carbon-fiber body with a fiberglass nose cone for RF transparency.

subsystems.name: Flight Dynamics
subsystems.summary: 6-DOF simulation sized the fins for a 2.1-caliber stability margin.
